mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in >60% of rising rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 290, inflation expectations become unanchored and force markets to price in higher real rates, driving negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day returns occur in >55% of observations where CPIAUCSL exceeds 290.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in the unemployment rate and increase in total payroll employment indicates a tightening labor market that outpaces productivity, triggering wage-price spiral fears and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns dominate when UNRATE falls and PAYEMS rises concurrently.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production signals manufacturing contraction and supply chain bottlenecks, which reduce near-term corporate earnings expectations and produce negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns follow INDPRO declines in >65% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product indicates stronger economic output and consumer spending, which directly supports corporate revenue growth and generates positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Negative 20-day returns follow GDP expansions in >60% of quarters.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate exceeding 1.5 percent signals a restrictive monetary stance that dampens business investment and household consumption, leading to negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day returns occur in >50% of observations when FEDFUNDS exceeds 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate below 4.0 percent during a late-cycle expansion creates severe labor shortages that compress corporate profit margins, resulting in negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur when UNRATE remains below 4.0 in late-cycle periods.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in retail sales and housing starts signal a sharp contraction in aggregate consumer demand, prompting immediate negative repricing of equity valuations.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns follow simultaneous declines in RSAFS and HOUST in >60% of cases.
